scenario_description: Four vehicles approach intersection from different directions. Blue car from north at 35 km/h, cyan car from south at 42 km/h, magenta car from east at 38 km/h, gray car from west at 28 km/h
Four vehicles converge at T-junction. Maroon car from north at 32 km/h, olive car from south at 40 km/h, lime car from east at 45 km/h, aqua car from west at 30 km/h
Vehicles meet at roundabout entrance. Teal car from north at 28 km/h, cyan car from south at 35 km/h, magenta car from east at 33 km/h, gray car from west at 38 km/h
Four cars approach signal-controlled crossing. Maroon car from north at 42 km/h, olive car from south at 36 km/h, lime car from east at 40 km/h, aqua car from west at 34 km/h
Complex intersection scenario. Teal car from north at 45 km/h, cyan car from south at 30 km/h, magenta car from east at 36 km/h, gray car from west at 32 km/h
Urban crossroads encounter. Maroon car from north at 38 km/h, olive car from south at 44 km/h, lime car from east at 35 km/h, aqua car from west at 40 km/h
Four-way stop scenario. Teal car from north at 25 km/h, cyan car from south at 28 km/h, magenta car from east at 30 km/h, gray car from west at 26 km/h
Busy junction merge. Maroon car from north at 48 km/h, olive car from south at 32 km/h, lime car from east at 42 km/h, aqua car from west at 36 km/h
Diagonal crossing paths. Teal car from north at 34 km/h, cyan car from south at 38 km/h, magenta car from east at 32 km/h, gray car from west at 35 km/h

Exit lane preparation. Ego magenta car changes from middle to right lane at 75 km/h. Gray car ahead at 70 km/h, maroon car behind at 78 km/h
Heavy traffic merge. Ego olive car changes from right to middle lane at 65 km/h. Lime car ahead at 68 km/h, aqua car behind at 62 km/h
Passing maneuver. Ego teal car changes from middle to left lane at 92 km/h. Cyan car ahead at 95 km/h, magenta car behind at 86 km/h
Return to cruising lane. Ego gray car changes from left to middle lane at 88 km/h. Maroon car ahead at 85 km/h, olive car behind at 90 km/h
Congested lane change. Ego lime car changes from middle to right lane at 55 km/h. Aqua car ahead at 52 km/h, teal car behind at 58 km/h

Emergency lane exit. Ego maroon car changes from left to middle lane at 82 km/h. Olive car ahead at 80 km/h, lime car behind at 84 km/h
Highway emergency stop. Lead aqua car suddenly brakes from 90 km/h. Ego teal car following at 88 km/h, 18m behind. Cyan car behind ego at 85 km/h
Urban street sudden stop. Lead magenta car brakes from 45 km/h. Ego gray car following at 42 km/h, 12m behind. Maroon car behind at 40 km/h
Traffic light stop. Lead olive car stops from 55 km/h. Ego lime car following at 52 km/h, 15m behind. Aqua car behind at 50 km/h
Pedestrian crossing stop. Lead teal car brakes from 35 km/h. Ego cyan car following at 32 km/h, 10m behind. Magenta car behind at 30 km/h
Obstacle avoidance stop. Lead gray car stops from 70 km/h. Ego maroon car following at 68 km/h, 20m behind. Olive car behind at 65 km/h
School zone stop. Lead lime car brakes from 25 km/h. Ego aqua car following at 23 km/h, 8m behind. Teal car behind at 20 km/h
Construction zone stop. Lead cyan car stops from 40 km/h. Ego magenta car following at 38 km/h, 14m behind. Gray car behind at 35 km/h
Rain conditions stop. Lead maroon car brakes from 60 km/h. Ego olive car following at 58 km/h, 22m behind. Lime car behind at 55 km/h
Night driving stop. Lead aqua car stops from 75 km/h. Ego teal car following at 72 km/h, 25m behind. Cyan car behind at 70 km/h

Rural road passing. Ego teal car at 75 km/h overtakes cyan car at 50 km/h. Magenta car oncoming at 70 km/h
Multi-lane overtake. Ego gray car at 95 km/h passes maroon car at 70 km/h. Olive car ahead in target lane at 100 km/h
City street overtake. Ego lime car at 55 km/h overtakes aqua car at 35 km/h. Teal car parked ahead
Express lane overtake. Ego cyan car at 120 km/h passes magenta car at 95 km/h. Gray car merging ahead at 100 km/h
Truck overtake. Ego maroon car at 85 km/h overtakes olive truck at 60 km/h. Lime car behind at 90 km/h

Night overtake. Ego teal car at 100 km/h overtakes cyan car at 75 km/h. Magenta car in distance at 105 km/h

School zone crossing. Child pedestrian crosses quickly. Ego olive car at 20 km/h. Lime car waiting opposite side
Intersection crossing. Multiple pedestrians. Ego aqua car at 25 km/h. Teal car turning right
Shopping area crossing. Elderly pedestrian. Ego cyan car at 15 km/h. Magenta car parking nearby
Rainy conditions crossing. Pedestrian with umbrella. Ego gray car at 22 km/h. Maroon car following carefully
Night crossing with lights. Jogger crosses quickly. Ego olive car at 35 km/h. Lime car approaching intersection
Residential crossing. Parent with stroller. Ego aqua car at 18 km/h. Teal car waiting to turn
Bus stop crossing. Group of pedestrians. Ego cyan car at 28 km/h. Magenta bus departing
Park entrance crossing. Dog walker crosses. Ego gray car at 12 km/h. Maroon car reversing into parking
Hospital crossing. Wheelchair user crosses. Ego olive car at 10 km/h. Lime ambulance approaching with lights
Highway on-ramp merge. Ego aqua car accelerating to 75 km/h. Teal car in main lane at 90 km/h, cyan car behind at 85 km/h
Zipper merge situation. Ego magenta car at 60 km/h. Gray car parallel at 62 km/h, maroon car allowing gap at 58 km/h
Construction zone merge. Ego olive car at 45 km/h. Lime car in continuing lane at 50 km/h, aqua car behind at 42 km/h
Exit ramp merge. Ego teal car at 70 km/h entering from right. Cyan car passing at 80 km/h, magenta car following at 75 km/h
Rush hour merge. Ego gray car at 35 km/h. Maroon car ahead at 38 km/h, olive car creating space at 32 km/h
Lane reduction merge. Ego lime car at 55 km/h. Aqua car alongside at 58 km/h, teal car behind slowing to 52 km/h
Freeway entrance merge. Ego cyan car accelerating to 85 km/h. Magenta truck at 75 km/h, gray car overtaking at 95 km/h
Toll plaza merge. Ego maroon car at 25 km/h. Olive car converging at 28 km/h, lime car ahead at 30 km/h
Service road merge. Ego aqua car at 40 km/h. Teal car in main road at 65 km/h, cyan car slowing for merge at 50 km/h
Complex interchange merge. Ego magenta car at 68 km/h. Gray car at 72 km/h, maroon car changing lanes at 70 km/h
Small roundabout entry. Ego olive car entering at 25 km/h. Lime car in roundabout at 20 km/h, aqua car waiting opposite
Large roundabout approach. Ego teal car at 30 km/h. Cyan car circulating at 28 km/h, magenta car exiting
Two-lane roundabout. Ego gray car entering inner lane at 35 km/h. Maroon car outer lane at 32 km/h, olive car merging
Mini roundabout navigation. Ego lime car at 18 km/h. Aqua car yielding at entry, teal car completing circuit
Turbo roundabout entry. Ego cyan car at 40 km/h entering dedicated lane. Magenta car parallel entry, gray car ahead
Oval roundabout approach. Ego maroon car at 28 km/h. Olive car in roundabout at 30 km/h, lime car preparing to exit
Spiral roundabout navigation. Ego aqua car at 22 km/h. Teal car changing lanes inside, cyan car waiting to enter
Traffic circle with crosswalks. Ego magenta car at 15 km/h. Gray car yielding to pedestrian, maroon car circulating slowly
Bypass lane roundabout. Ego olive car using bypass at 45 km/h. Lime car in main circle at 25 km/h, aqua car merging from bypass
Flower roundabout entry. Ego teal car at 32 km/h. Cyan car taking third exit, magenta car entering from left
Street parallel parking. Ego gray car reversing into space between maroon car and olive car. Both parked 5m apart
Tight parallel parking. Ego lime car maneuvering between aqua car and teal car. 4m space available
Parking lot perpendicular parking. Ego cyan car entering space between magenta car and gray car
Reverse perpendicular parking. Ego maroon car backing into spot between olive car and lime car
Angled parking entry. Ego aqua car entering 45-degree space between teal car and cyan car
Diagonal parking maneuver. Ego magenta car parking between gray car and maroon car at 60-degree angle
Multi-level garage parking. Ego olive car entering narrow space between lime car and aqua car on ramp
Underground parking. Ego teal car maneuvering in tight space between cyan car and magenta van
Valet parking area. Ego gray car positioning between maroon luxury car and olive sports car
Hotel valet zone. Ego lime car parking between aqua SUV and teal sedan in covered area
Highway aggressive cut-in. Cyan car suddenly cuts in front of ego magenta car with 8m gap at 95 km/h
Urban cut-in scenario. Gray car cuts in front of ego maroon car with 5m gap at 45 km/h
Fast lane cut-in. Olive car aggressively merges in front of ego lime car at 110 km/h with 10m gap
Exit ramp cut-in. Aqua car cuts across to exit in front of ego teal car at 70 km/h
Congested traffic cut-in. Cyan car squeezes in front of ego magenta car with 4m gap at 30 km/h
Dual cut-in scenario. Gray car cuts in while maroon car also merges ahead of ego olive car
Rain conditions cut-in. Lime car dangerously cuts in front of ego aqua car on wet road at 55 km/h
Construction zone cut-in. Teal car merges abruptly in front of ego cyan car at 40 km/h
Night highway cut-in. Magenta car cuts in with headlights glaring in front of ego gray car at 85 km/h
Multiple lane cut-in. Maroon car cuts across two lanes in front of ego olive car at 100 km/h
Busy urban intersection with pedestrians. Ego lime car at 25 km/h, aqua car crossing, teal cyclist on right, two pedestrians crossing
School zone chaos. Ego cyan car at 20 km/h, magenta bus stopping, gray car behind, three child pedestrians
Market street scenario. Ego maroon car at 15 km/h, olive van unloading, lime car waiting, vendor crossing
Emergency response scenario. Ego aqua car yielding, teal ambulance with sirens, cyan police car, pedestrians evacuating
Construction detour. Ego magenta car at 30 km/h, gray truck blocking lane, maroon car merging, worker directing traffic
Festival street closure. Ego olive car rerouting at 18 km/h, lime car U-turning, crowd of pedestrians celebrating
Delivery zone congestion. Ego aqua car at 22 km/h, teal truck double-parked, cyan car squeezing through, delivery person crossing
Transit hub intersection. Ego teal car at 28 km/h, cyan bus at stop, magenta taxi picking up, multiple passengers
Accident scene ahead. Ego gray car slowing to 12 km/h, maroon car stopped with hazards, olive emergency vehicle, gawking pedestrians

orientation.scenario_description: Night entertainment district. Ego lime car at 35 km/h, aqua rideshare stopping suddenly, teal taxi swerving, pedestrians jaywalking
